1.title: Adaptive Data Retention - Replay
1.query:
timeseries replay = avg(dt.sfm.server.adaptive_data_retention.replay)
| sort arrayAvg(replay) desc
| limit 20

2.title: Adaptive Data Retention - Transaction
2.query:
timeseries transaction = avg(dt.sfm.server.adaptive_data_retention.transaction)
| sort arrayAvg(transaction) desc
| limit 20

3.title: Configured Data Retention - Code Level
3.query:

| sort arrayAvg(code_level) desc
| limit 20

4.title: Configured Data Retention - Code Level - Current - Data Size

| sort arrayAvg(data_size) desc
| limit 20
